name: investigation-remote
description: Thin Claude Desktop extension that proxies planner-led investigation requests to a remote streamable HTTP MCP server with deterministic alert-vs-generic routing.
long_description: Claude Desktop extension for a controller-backed investigation stack. This bundle runs a local Node MCP server over stdio and forwards high-level investigation requests to the kagent controller MCP endpoint. The proxy adds a deterministic planner-led wrapper so alert-shaped requests preserve alert extraction while generic investigations follow the same resolve, plan, bounded execution, update, and late-render path through the same agent.

tools.name: investigate
tools.description: Investigate a Kubernetes issue through the controller-backed investigation path, with deterministic generic-vs-alert entrypoint routing.

tools.name: list_investigation_agents
tools.description: List invokable investigation agents exposed by the controller.

remote_mcp_url.title: Remote MCP URL
remote_mcp_url.description: Reachable controller MCP endpoint, for example https://mcp.example.com/mcp.

remote_mcp_bearer_token.title: Bearer token
remote_mcp_bearer_token.description: Optional bearer token sent to the remote MCP server.

allow_insecure_tls.title: Allow insecure TLS
allow_insecure_tls.description: Disable TLS verification for lab-only endpoints with self-signed certificates.

default_agent_ref.title: Default agent ref
default_agent_ref.description: Default kagent agent reference in namespace/name format.
